name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Degree)
benefit_description: ₹ 50,000/- per annum for every year of study, i.e. maximum of 4 years for first-year admitted students and a maximum of 3 years for second-year admitted students, through lateral entry as a lump sum amount towards payment of college fees, purchase of computer, stationeries, books, equipment, softwar
details: A scholarship scheme by AICTE, MoE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical degree course in an AICTE approved institution. A maximum of two girl children per family are eligible to avail of the benefits. The benefits are provided for a period of maximum of 4 years for first-year admitted students and a maximum of 3 years for second-year admitted students through lateral entry. This scheme is an attempt to give young women the opportunity to further their education and prep
eligibility_text: The applicant must be a Girl Student. The applicant must be pursuing either the First year of the degree course OR the Second year of the Degree course through lateral entry. The annual income of the family (from all sources) must not be more than ₹ 8,00,000/- per annum during the current financial year. All eligible girls (who submit online scholarship form) from the following 13 Union Territorie
